title: Apply User-Requested Changes to Portfolio Site

requirements.text: Review the existing portfolio site and clarify what specific changes the user wants. In the meantime, make the following visible polish improvements: (1) Increase the hero section headline font size for greater visual impact on desktop. (2) Ensure all navigation links scroll precisely to their target sections without offset issues. (3) Add a real phone number placeholder '+91 XXXXX XXXXX' in the Contact section if not already present. (4) Make the portfolio grid items slightly taller for better visual balance. (5) Ensure the footer copyright year reads 2025.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero headline is visually large and bold on desktop screens
All nav links (Home, Work, Education, Contact) scroll correctly to their sections
Contact section shows a phone placeholder '+91 XXXXX XXXXX'
Portfolio grid items have adequate height for visual balance
Footer copyright line shows © 2025 Sulekha Sahoo

constraints: Do not alter the immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components)
All existing features and content must remain intact
nonGoals: Adding new sections or features not previously requested
Changing the overall color scheme or typography system
